summary.zh: 色彩 / Look-dev 工作台(规划中)。目标是统一管理一款游戏的全局色调:colorgrade.toml 调色、theme.json 主题、后处理栈(palette + LUT + 后处理),让画面风格可集中调、可复用,并接 2D 风格迁移与 3D LookMaster。当前为 marketplace 占位:清单与入口就位,真实面板安排在后续 sprint 落地。
summary.en: Color & look-dev workbench (planned). The goal is to manage a game's global color centrally: colorgrade.toml grading, a theme.json, and a postprocess stack (palette + LUT + postprocess), making the look tunable and reusable, with 2D style-transfer and 3D LookMaster to follow. Currently a marketplace placeholder: manifest and entry are in place, with the real panel scheduled for a later sprint.

body.zh:
colorgrade.toml + theme.json + 后处理栈
palette / LUT / 后处理统一全局色调
body.en:
colorgrade.toml + theme.json + postprocess stack
palette / LUT / postprocess for global grading

body.zh: marketplace 占位,面板实现待后续 sprint
body.en: Marketplace placeholder; panel lands in a later sprint
